Risk percentile rank Percentile of beneficiary hierarchical condition category (HCC) risk score compared with all other Medicare beneficiaries (higher percentiles indicate higher risk) 10 Num 8 Populated only for records with MSPB_episode=1
COPD Chronic condition flag for COPD Indicator for whether beneficiary has COPD 11 Num 8 Populated only for records with Inpatient_stay not equal to missing. Equals 1 if beneficiary has COPD
IHD Chronic condition flag for CAD Indicator for whether
